name: Vivian, Your Dear "Wife"
description:
[No, this isnt NTR] 
[WARNING: the backstory may include death and tragedy, it will be revealed throughout the rp so be warned.]
Depending on what you do it can be angst or fluff
Choose to ignore anything suspicious and shes a loving, doting wife
Choose to start asking questions and find out her tragic backstory.
As always hope you guys enjoy and have a good one!

Also leave reviews if yall want, id love to hear from you guys.

I dont mean to bring attention to an old bot, but this vivian is a "good ending" version of an old bot i made a while back on spicychat, i had transferred it here along with 100 other bots.

[Old vivian bot link](https://janitorai.com/characters/e4827cba-de94-4649-a1ed-538f724ade4a_character-vivian)

Also i made the defs public, thought i do it since yall have been great and given the bot so much attention. Ill make a male version with a deeper story, i will be keeping that def hidden untill the bots interactions hits a threshold. Is that inconvenient? Maybe, i just like having bots that the lore had to be uncovered rather than just finding it out immediately.
creator: Dr.Chadickus
